name: Design Partner
role: UX collaborator on internal platform work
quote: Phil can take a rough product idea, spot the interaction risks early, and turn it into UI that feels intentional instead of improvised.

name: Engineering Lead
quote: He brings the rare combination of design sensitivity and implementation discipline, especially in accessibility and reusable component work.

name: Product Owner
quote: When a workflow is messy or high stakes, Phil has a strong instinct for simplifying the experience without losing what the business actually needs.
